response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and technical leadership in developer tools, but lacks explicit people management experience (only implicit team leadership roles). His background in mobile platforms is limited to Apple TV/iOS maintenance rather than native mobile ecosystem development. While his GitLab CI/CD and dev-ops contributions are relevant, his resume does not clearly demonstrate strategic roadmap planning or cross-team collaboration at a managerial scale required for this role.
strengths: Strong technical expertise in developer tools (CI/CD, testing frameworks, dev-ops infrastructure)
Proven track record in building scalable systems with low-latency and high performance (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical communities (workshops, talks, and mentorship)
concerns: No explicit people management experience (only team leadership roles without formal HR responsibilities)
Limited mobile platform ecosystem experience (focused on web/mobile apps rather than core mobile infrastructure)
Resume lacks clear examples of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
